title: Internal error occurs if event control follows a forever statement

features.name: forever loop with event control
features.description: Code should include a forever loop with an event control delay inside the loop body

features.name: fork-join_none with forever loop
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_none block containing a forever loop
features.snippet:
fork
  forever @p.a begin
    if ( p.a == 0 ) $display("Unexpected zero");
  end
join_none

features.name: class with int property accessed in forever loop
features.description: Code should include a class with an int property accessed via event control in a forever loop
